name: Fireeye ETP
description: Cloud Edition provides RESTful APIs for custom integration. The APIs are provided for Advanced Threats, Email Trace, and Quarantine functionalities

actions.name: On Poll
actions.description: Callback action for the on_poll ingest functionality

parameters.name: container_id
parameters.description: Container IDs to size the ingestion to

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Start of the time range, in epoch time (milliseconds)

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End of the time range, in epoch time (milliseconds)

parameters.name: container_count
parameters.description: The maximum number of container records to query for

parameters.name: artifact_count
parameters.description: The maximum number of artifact records to query for

actions.name: List Alerts
actions.description: Get a list of alerts from the ETP instance

parameters.name: legacy_id
parameters.description: Alert ID as shown in Email Security Web Portal

parameters.name: message_id
parameters.description: ETP Email message ID

parameters.name: email_status
parameters.description: Filter by ETP email status. Comma-separated list allowed. See app documentation for a list of acceptable values

parameters.name: num_days
parameters.description: The number of days to get alerts for (ETP Defaults to last 90 days)

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of alerts to retrieve per response. Valid range: 1-200 (ETP Defaults to 20)

actions.name: Get Alert
actions.description: Get details about a specific alert from the ETP instance

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: Alert ID as shown in Email Security Web Portal

actions.name: List Email Attributes
actions.description: Get all the attributes from a list of email messages

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The number of alerts to include in a response. Valid range: 1-200 (ETP Defaults to 20)

actions.name: Get Email Attributes
actions.description: Get the attributes of a particular message with the specified Email Security message ID

parameters.name: etp_message_id
parameters.description: The ID of the Email Security message

actions.name: Trace Email
actions.description: Search for Email Message by specifying one or more filters

parameters.name: domains
parameters.description: Specific domain(s) to search by. Comma-separated list allowed

parameters.name: modified_date
parameters.description: Datetime stamp to limit the search period

parameters.name: recipients
parameters.description: The recipients of the email. The maximum allowed per request is 10. Comma-separated list allowed

parameters.name: sender
parameters.description: The sender of the email. The maximum allowed per request is 10. Comma-separated list allowed

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: ETP status to search by. Comma-separated list allowed

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: The subject of the email to search for

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Tags from ETP that are associated with an email

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The number of alerts to include in a response. Valid range: 1-300 (ETP Defaults to 20)

actions.name: Trace Message
actions.description: Search for Email Message by specifying the Queue/Message-ID of the Downstream MTA or the Original Message-ID. At least one parameter must be filled out. All fields are filtered by the IN clause where applicable

parameters.name: original_message_id
parameters.description: The email's Original-Message-ID header value

parameters.name: downstream_message_id
parameters.description: The email's Downstream-Message-ID header value

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The number of alerts to include in a response. Valid range: 1-300 (ETP Defaults to 20)

actions.name: Download Email
actions.description: Download the email header as a text file and add it to the vault

parameters.name: etp_message_id
parameters.description: The ID of the Email Security message to download

actions.name: Download Pcap
actions.description: Downloads all the PCAP files of the alert for a specified alert ID and add the files to the vault

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: The ID of the Email Security message to download

actions.name: Download Malware Files
actions.description: Download all malware files of the alert for a specified alert ID and add the files to the vault

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: The ID of the Email Security message to download

actions.name: Download Case Files
actions.description: Download all case files of the alert for a specified alert ID and add the files to the vault

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: The ID of the Email Security message to download

actions.name: Remediate Emails
actions.description: Enqueues the message IDs provided in the request for remediation from the user's Office365 mailbox

parameters.name: etp_message_ids
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of ETP Message IDs

parameters.name: action_override
parameters.description: Allows you to override the default action

parameters.name: move_to
parameters.description: When 'move' is chosen for action_override, this parameter is mandatory and allows you to specify the folder to move the email to

actions.name: Get Quarantined Email
actions.description: Download the email file present in the quarantine for the given Email Security message ID and add it to the vault

parameters.name: etp_message_id
parameters.description: The ID of the Email Security message to download

actions.name: Unquarantine Email
actions.description: Release the email file(s) present in the Quarantine within ETP

parameters.name: etp_message_id
parameters.description: The ID of the Email Security message to unquarantine. Allows for a comma-separated string of IDs

parameters.name: is_not_spam
parameters.description: Report as not spam to the Spam Engines

parameters.name: headers_only
parameters.description: Share only the email headers with Spam Engines

actions.name: Delete Quarantined Email
actions.description: Delete the email file(s) present in quarantine for the given Email Security message ID

parameters.name: etp_message_id
parameters.description: The ID of the Email Security message to delete. Allows a comma-separated string of IDs

actions.name: List Quarantined Emails
actions.description: Get a list of quarantined emails from a given query filter

parameters.name: from_date
parameters.description: Start date to use to search the by. Date in YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.SSSSSS in UTC

parameters.name: to_date
parameters.description: End date to use to search by. Date in YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.SSSSSS in UTC

parameters.name: domains
parameters.description: Specific domain(s) to search by. Comma-separated list allowed

parameters.name: email_server
parameters.description: Specific email server to search by

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Email address of the sender to search by

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Reason the email was quarantined. The strings must be of the following reasons, Action, Advanced Threat, Policy, Spam or Virus. Comma-separated list allowed

parameters.name: recipients
parameters.description: Recipient(s) to search by. Comma-separated list allowed

parameters.name: sender_domain
parameters.description: The senders domain to search by

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: The subject of the email to search by

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The number of alerts to include in response. Valid range: 1-200 (ETP Defaults to 20)

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Tag associated with email. Must be of the follow tags, auto_remediation, impersonation, or manual_remediation. Comma-separated list allowed
